videos.title: John Craig Memorial Ski Tour 2022
videos.description: TV Video provided by Central Oregon Daily News.  An overview of the John Craig Memorial Ski Tour and Race
videos.transcript:
well skiers paid tribute to the skiing
mailman of the mackenzie pass this
happened over the weekend the john craig
memorial ski tour and race it returned
on saturday to the delight of a couple
hundred nordic skiers the oregon nordic
club hosted the event which got its
start back in the 1930s it honors craig
a pioneer postmaster who carried mail
across the pass of course by horse in
the summer and then by skis in the
winter he was found dead in his shack
near the top of the pass in the winter
of
1877. it sort of brings back a lot of
the
a lot of skiers who and actually makes a
camaraderie
where
people go out individually skiing or
they might go with a group somewhere but
this is bringing together how many
people really are involved with
cross-country skiing around the state
didn't know what it would feel like on
skate skis compared to a bicycle but it
actually wasn't so bad i had never heard
of it before actually and when i heard
the story
i was so excited to actually be a part
of it the mount jefferson snowmobile
club groomed the course and provided
race day support most skiers opted for a
leisurely tour the self-timed racers
skated for bragging rights

videos.title: Little John Triple + ski down (Craigleith Ski Club, ON)
videos.description:
The oldest lift at Craigleith Ski Club (as of 2020) is Little John. Built in 1987 by Doppelmayr, this lift replaced a Hall T-bar and runs between the zipper and little john slopes. 



Unusually for a beginner lift, Little John has a 1/2 unload station with a portal tower, allowing first timers to ski the lower portions of little john and zipper.


IMO it's one of my favourite beginner chairlifts I've ridden. And it runs at a decent pace.


Towers: 8
Chairs: 58
